project_context.design_archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) x Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) Hybrid
project_context.visual_reference: Notion (minimalism, typography-driven, command palette, muted surfaces)

rules.anti_default_rule: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans are STRICTLY BANNED.
rules.hierarchy_gap: Do not exceed 2 Tailwind steps between heading and subheading.

headings.weight_strategy: Radical weight contrast (Light for elegance, Black for critical numbers)

body.weight_strategy: Regular for reading, Medium for labels

surface_strategies.headers: Solid Background (#0A0A0B) with hard bottom border (#27272A). No muddy glassmorphism for medical data.
surface_strategies.cards: Neumorphic flat: Background matches parent or +1 elevation (#121214). Sharp 1px border (#27272A). No shadow in dark mode.
surface_strategies.grid_borders: For the census table, expose the grid. border-collapse with subtle #1F1F22 borders.

spacing_system.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards to prevent text collision.
spacing_system.density: Laptop view uses tight density (gap-2, p-3) for census. Tablet view uses generous density (gap-6, p-8) for focus.

view_1_laptop_census.description: The command center. High-density data grid for all 46 patients.
structure: Left Sidebar (Notion-style): 240px width, collapses on tablet. Links to Censo, Laboratorios, Configuracion, Usuarios.
Top Header: Global Search (Cmd+K), Filters (Especialidad, Adscrito), 'Sincronizar' status, 'Corte de Guardia' button.
Main Content: Full-width CSS Grid/Table. Exposes the skeleton (Grid Borders pattern).
Interactions: Keyboard navigation (arrows). Hovering a row reveals quick-action icons (✍️, 🔔, 📄).

view_2_tablet_rounds.description: Focus mode for the surgical rounds. One patient at a time, optimized for Apple Pencil/S-Pen.
structure: Header: Collapsed sidebar (hamburger). Top shows current patient index (e.g., 'Paciente 4 de 46') + Swipe indicators.
Main Content: A single, massive 'Bento Grid' Card taking 90% of screen.
- Top Row (col-span-full): Patient Name, Cama, Edad, Expediente.
- Left Col (col-span-2): DX, PA, APP, Qx.
- Right Col (col-span-1): Signos Vitales, Balance, Drenajes, Sangrado.
- Bottom (col-span-full): Manejo, Pendientes, Notas (Large touch targets for stylus).
interactions: Swipe left/right anywhere on the card to change patient.
Mini ✍️ buttons are permanently visible next to each field in Tablet mode (target size min 44x44px for stylus/finger).

components.button_primary: bg-accent-primary text-text-inverse hover:bg-accent-primary_hover rounded-sm px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
components.button_ghost: hover:bg-surface_hover text-text-secondary hover:text-text-primary rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors
components.mini_stylus_btn: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-surface border border-border flex items-center justify-center text-text-secondary hover:text-accent-primary hover:border-accent-primary transition-all
components.inputs: bg-background border border-border rounded-sm px-3 py-2 text-text-primary focus:border-accent-primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent-primary
components.status_badge: px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST explicitly change text color and border on hover. (e.g. hover:border-accent-primary).
motion_and_interactions.swipe_animation: When swiping patients in Rounds mode, use a subtle slide + fade (Framer Motion style, or simple CSS transform/opacity transition).

implementation_instructions_for_main_age.scope: Apply these styles WITHIN the existing 14,500-line index.html. DO NOT split into React/frameworks.
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.css_variables: Inject the color system as CSS :root variables (e.g., --bg-base: #0A0A0B).
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.testing_preservation: CRITICAL: You MUST NOT remove or alter ANY 'data-testid' attributes. The entire test suite depends on them.
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.fonts_injection: Import Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi, and JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts or Fontshare CDN in the <head>.
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (via CDN) for elegant, duotone, or regular weight clinical icons.
implementation_instructions_for_main_age.dark_mode_enforcement: Hardcode the dark mode colors into the primary CSS classes, or apply a forced '.dark' class to the body.

media_and_assets.images: No external images required. The UI is completely typography and data-driven for clinical focus.
